overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban street beneath elevated highways. The scene features wet pavement reflecting neon lights, massive brutalist architecture looming in the distance, and light pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a futuristic city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated transit infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, following the path forward

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt walking in the same direction alongside the ego character

entered.detail: massive concrete transit structure with red neon underlighting spanning across the street
tall weathered concrete wall with metal fencing and graffiti on the right side of the walkway
metal barricade separating the pedestrian walkway from the multi-lane road
horizontal red neon tubes mounted underneath the elevated highway structure
futuristic train or tram station with illuminated windows on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway. The environment features industrial concrete walls on the right, metal barriers separating the walkway from the road on the left, and red neon lights illuminating the underside of the overpass. A few pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street opening with view of distant mega-structure

events.description: massive brutalist skyscraper comes into view in the distance as the camera emerges from under the overpass section

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as the street opens up revealing the towering structure ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past on the road to the left of the pedestrian walkway

entered.detail: colossal brutalist architecture with tiered concrete sections dominating the skyline in the distance
black and white regulatory sign indicating speed limit of 40 mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: As the character walks forward, the street opens up to reveal a massive brutalist skyscraper towering in the distance. The camera passes a speed limit 40 sign on the left while vehicles drive past on the road. The lighting becomes more natural as the camera moves out from under the densest part of the overpass, though the elevated structure remains visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with industrial buildings and burning refuse

events.description: passing the speed limit sign and continuing deeper under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking past the speed limit sign and approaching a burning barrel while following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead under the overpass in the distance

entered.detail: multi-story red brick industrial structure with small windows visible on the left side of the street
metal barrel with visible flames and smoke emitting from burning refuse on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the speed limit sign, which falls behind, and approaches a burning trash barrel on the right side of the walkway. A red industrial building becomes visible on the left while the massive skyscraper grows larger in the center view. The camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow jacket walking ahead under the persistent cover of the elevated highway structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dystopian urban walkway that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial underpass toward a vista dominated by a towering brutalist skyscraper. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, where red neon lights cast a glow over concrete walls and metal barriers as the camera follows a character and a few pedestrians forward. As the character advances, the street opens up to reveal the distant skyscraper, and the lighting shifts toward a more natural tone while the camera passes a speed limit sign and flowing vehicle traffic. The scene then shifts further along the path, moving past the sign toward a burning trash barrel on the right and a red industrial building on the left. Finally, the camera continues its steady progression, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket as the massive skyscraper looms larger in the center of the frame.
